LanguageData.RI_PeachBlossomFogEnterWarning: The map was shrouded in fog and the entrance could not be found.
LanguageData.RI_PeachBlossomFogEnterLost_Letter_Label: Lost in the Peach blossom maze.
LanguageData.RI_PeachBlossomFogEnterLost_Letter_Desc: Due to the influence of the Peach blossom maze, the creature was lost and failed to reach here.
LanguageData.RI_PeachBlossomFogFormCaravanWarning: Due to the influence of the Peach blossom maze, the caravan could not be organized.
LanguageData.RI_PanPeach_AgeReduced: {PAWN} eat the Immoral peach, suddenly feel comfortable, become younger.
LanguageData.RI_PeachBlossomFogEnterLost_Letter_Desc2: Out of the fog you hear a voice that seems to be:
